template:
set +e && 'fastqvalidator' '--file' 'reads_R1.fastq.gz' > 'out/validation_r1.log' 2>&1
status_r1=$? && status_r2=0 && strict_pass=true && exit_code=0 && if [ "$status_r1" -ne 0 ]; then strict_pass=false; exit_code=$status_r1; fi && if [ "$status_r2" -ne 0 ]; then strict_pass=false; if [ "$exit_code" -eq 0 ]; then exit_code=$status_r2; fi; fi && printf '%s\n' '{"input_r1":"reads_R1.fastq.gz","input_r2":null,"paired_mode":"single_end","q_cutoff":null,"schema_version":"bijux.fastq.validate.lineage.v1","stage_id":"fastq.validate_reads","tool_id":"fastqvalidator","validated_stream_ids":["reads_r1"],"validation_report":"out/validation.json"}' > 'out/validated_reads_manifest.json' && printf '{"schema_version":"bijux.fastq.validate.report.v1","stage":"fastq.validate_reads","stage_id":"fastq.validate_reads","tool_id":"fastqvalidator","input_r1":%%s,"input_r2":%%s,"validation_log_r1":%%s,"validation_log_r2":%%s,"validated_inputs":1,"strict_pass":%%s,"exit_code":%%s}' '"reads_R1.fastq.gz"' 'null' '"out/validation_r1.log"' 'null' "$strict_pass" "$exit_code" > 'out/validation.json' && exit "$exit_code"
